mapper.sql: select c.catch_id, c.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, c.venue_id, c.order_id, c.fish_species, c.weight_jin, c.fish_count, c.images, c.content, c.fishing_method, c.is_featured, c.like_count, c.comment_count, c.status, c.reject_reason, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_time from fish_catch_record c left join fish_user u on u.user_id = c.user_id
mapper.select: where c.del_flag = '0' and c.status = 1 order by c.is_featured desc, c.create_time desc limit 100
where c.del_flag = '0' and c.user_id = #{userId} order by c.create_time desc limit 50
mapper.insert: insert into fish_catch_record (user_id, venue_id, order_id, fish_species, weight_jin, fish_count, images, content, fishing_method, is_featured, like_count, status, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{venueId}, #{orderId}, #{fishSpecies}, #{weightJin}, #{fishCount}, #{images}, #{content}, #{fishingMethod}, 0, 0, 0, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_catch_record set del_flag = '2' where catch_id in #{id}
update fish_catch_record set like_count = like_count + 1 where catch_id = #{catchId}
update fish_catch_record set like_count = greatest(like_count - 1, 0) where catch_id = #{catchId}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into fish_catch_like (user_id, catch_id) values (#{userId}, #{catchId})
mapper.delete: delete from fish_catch_like where user_id = #{userId} and catch_id = #{catchId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from fish_catch_like where user_id = #{userId} and catch_id = #{catchId}
